_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of web services, including service-oriented architecture, Simple Object Access Protocol, and web service description language.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-011 (TF, cosine: 0.563), AI-K-004 (AI, cosine: 0.542).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.467). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, service, services]. DCWF-only terms [access, architecture, description, language, object, oriented] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.888, R=0.880). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Knowledge of web services, including service-oriented architecture, Simple Objec" and "Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, inclu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.586 > STS 0.467 (gap +0.119). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, service, services] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, service, services]. DCWF-only: [access, architecture, description, language, object, oriented]. WIDAI-only: [applied, catalog, continual, data, design, improvement].
